description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a brick exterior and a symmetrical front facade. The front features a double garage, a driveway with a yellow car, and a manicured lawn with several trees and shrubs. The rear of the house includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, a patio area, and a small playhouse or shed. The roof is mostly flat with some raised sections and skylights, and there are numerous windows arranged in regular rows on all sides. The house has a prominent front porch with columns and a balcony above, giving it a stately appearance. The property is bordered by a green lawn and a paved street, typical of a residential neighborhood.
description: A large, two-story brick house with a double garage, front porch, and backyard pool, surrounded by a manicured lawn and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, driveway with a yellow car, main entry porch, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, playhouse, and multiple windows and doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side lawn, trees, and the rear section of the house with visible windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with columns, steps leading up, and a decorative front door.
